The ADDIE Model , Visual Reference

About

Learning is not a product.
It's a design problem.

I'm María Fernanda , a bilingual Learning Content Developer with experience spanning eLearning design, LMS administration, and corporate training. I work at the intersection of instructional strategy and hands-on development, building learning that actually changes behavior.

My background combines deep Workday Learning LMS expertise , managing 81-course catalogs, reporting, and SCORM compliance , with instructional design in Rise 360 and Storyline 360, always grounded in the ADDIE model. Being fully bilingual in English and Spanish means I can design and deliver training for global audiences without losing nuance in either language.
